prerequisites.value: Catch Off-Guard or Throw Anything, Shikigami Mimicry, Shikigami Style, Use Magic Device 5 ranks.

description.value:
**Benefit:** While using Shikigami Style, you can treat any magical item youâre using as an improvised weapon as if it granted an enhancement bonus on attack and damage rolls equal to the itemâs caster level divided by 4 (minimum +1), to a maximum bonus of +5.

**Special:** A character with this feat and Equipment Trick who uses magical equipment to perform a trick can add a bonus equal to the itemâs caster level divided by 4 (minimum +1) on skill or combat maneuver checks attempted as part of the trick.
